prompt:
I pushed a markdown file to GitHub and my matrix equation is showing as raw LaTeX instead of rendered math. Here's what I wrote:

$$
\begin{pmatrix}
a & b \\
c & d
\end{pmatrix}
$$

What's wrong and how do I fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies the root cause as GitHub's Markdown pre-processor stripping \\ before the math renderer
Recommends converting to ```math fenced block syntax
Provides a corrected code example using ```math...``` instead of $$...$$
Generalizes the rule to all equations containing \\ (not just matrices)
